data.content:
This is an NUnit project using VSTest. Use the `--filter` flag with `FullyQualifiedName` to target the class:

```
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests"
```

The `~` operator means "contains", so this matches all tests inside `ReportExporterTests` but not `ReportGeneratorTests`.
